pi_items.source: Odoo official demo data (setup_data.py line 9 lists Anita Oliver as one of 20 bundled employees in hr/data/hr_demo.xml). Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 35 and export_result.sh line 97.
Consistently referenced in setup_task.sh line 53 and export_result.sh line 43 as the target email login for the new user account.

Confirmed as a legitimate security group in Odoo's hr_recruitment module (referenced in export_result.sh lines 72-73 with check_object_reference call). Verified via GitHub odoo/odoo PR #47373 which documents the group_hr_recruitment_user and group_hr_recruitment_manager access control groups.

privileged_info_summary: The task provisions a user account for Anita Oliver, an employee from Odoo's official demo dataset. The user account login is anita.oliver@example.com, and access rights are controlled via the hr_recruitment.group_hr_recruitment_user security group, which grants recruitment application permissions without system administrator access.
